text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Heyyy! I'm Mayano Top Gun! I'm looking forward
to flying with you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I wanna become a dazzling adult! A grown-up Umamusume who makes everyone swoon!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: So you better keep me in your sights, Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
